data.title: OKX Web3 Wallet is now connected to the Story Protocol network
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX Web3 wallet is now connected to the Story Protocol mainnet. Users can switch to the Story Protocol mainnet with one click without manual configuration to view, transfer, trade Story Protoco mainnet NFTs in the OKX NFT market, and manage related assets.
It is reported that Story Protocol is a Layer 1 focused on intellectual property (IP) management, dedicated to completely changing the way the traditional creative economy works through transparency and programmability on the chain. As the industry's leading one-stop Web3 portal, OKX Web3 wallet has supported more than 120 popular public chains, and provides a seamless experience of App, plug-ins, web pages and Telegram Mini wallets, creating an efficient and convenient on-chain interactive environment for users.

data.title: a16z Crypto Managing Partner Chris Dixon: Brian Quintenz will be an excellent CFTC Chairman
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: After Brian Quintenz, global head of a16z Crypto policy, was nominated by US President Trump as the next chairman of the US Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), Chris Dixon, managing partner of a16z Crypto, posted on the X platform that Brian Quintenz has joined a16z Crypto for more than three years, initially as a senior consultant and later as a policy director. His expertise is very valuable to the cryptocurrency industry and he will be an excellent CFTC chairman.

data.title: Analyst: Fed may not cut rates until fall
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News MainSky Asset Management analyst Eckhard Schulte said that the slow progress of US inflation may mean that the Federal Reserve will not cut interest rates until the fall, or not at all this year. "This is not our core assumption, but in the end it will not establish a new 'market static'," Schulte said. U.S. inflation data in January was higher than expected, prompting a knee-jerk reaction in the U.S. Treasury market and rising yields. Schulte said this would only happen if the Federal Reserve talked about possible rate hikes. "But as long as the inflation situation does not deteriorate significantly in the coming months, this will not happen." (Jinshi)

data.title: LBank will launch MyShell (SHELL)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch MyShell (SHELL) at 22:30 (SGT) on February 13, and open the SHELL/USDT trading pair. The deposit service will be opened at 19:00 on February 13, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 19:00 on February 14.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based RON perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 50 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched U-based RON perpetual contracts with a maximum leverage of 50 times. Contract strategy trading will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: AscendEX will launch Baby Fwog (BABYFWOG)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Baby Fwog (BABYFWOG) at 21:00 on February 14, opening the BABYFWOG/USDT trading pair, and recharge is now open.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%.

data.title: International New Age DJ MAO will appear at Gate.io’s Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival officially announced that the international new generation DJ MAO will make a heavy debut and bring a variety of electronic music performances to the audience. This music festival is exclusively sponsored by Gate.io and is an official special event of the Consensus Conference.
In 2025, the Consensus Conference will expand to Hong Kong for the first time, and the Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival will make its debut during this event. As an important part of the industry event, the Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival is expected to attract 5,000 spectators and bring together the world's top DJs, well-known bands and international music groups to bring a shocking and interactive audio-visual feast. DJ MAO has rich experience in live performances and is good at combining his favorite music with creativity. He often brings unexpected surprises to the audience and has become more popular in recent years.
The tickets for the Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival adopt a screening registration mechanism. The application channel is now open. Music lovers can apply by clicking the "original link".

data.title: Elon Musk Considers Withdrawing Offer Over OpenAI's Profit Shift
data.description: According to Foresight News, Elon Musk has announced his intention to withdraw a $97.4 billion offer to control OpenAI's nonprofit organization if the board continues its transition towards becoming a for-profit entity. Musk's statement highlights his concerns over the direction OpenAI is taking, emphasizing the importance of maintaining its nonprofit status.

data.title: A whale deposited 799,895 OMs to Binance, about $4.33 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 799,895 OM (about 4.33 million US dollars) into Binance after holding OM for nearly two months. The whale initially withdrew about 4.4 million OM, worth 15.95 million US dollars, and transferred 3.6 million OM to another address 13 hours ago. Currently, the value of these OM is 23.96 million US dollars, which means that its floating profit is 8 million US dollars.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 710 USDT with a 8.85% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2025, 10:41 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 710 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 710.150024 USDT, with a narrowed 8.85% increase in 24 hours.
